snippets.description: The migration — 5x additive nullable TEXT ADD COLUMN, no FK/index/default/drop.
snippets.content: ALTER TABLE "credit_ledger" ADD COLUMN "ap_circuit_id" text; ALTER TABLE "network_sessions" ADD COLUMN "ap_circuit_id" text; ALTER TABLE "payment_checkouts" ADD COLUMN "ap_circuit_id" text; ALTER TABLE "payment_transactions" ADD COLUMN "ap_circuit_id" text; ALTER TABLE "points_ledger" ADD COLUMN "ap_circuit_id" text;

snippets.description: AC6 load-bearing guarantee: circuit-id resolved via resolveApCircuitPreTx (try/catch-wrapped) BEFORE db.transaction opens in both grant entrypoints; threaded as a plain string param into spendCreditsTx/spendPointsTx and bindMacTx. No resolveCircuitIdForMac call inside any db.transaction callback.
snippets.content: const apCircuitId = await resolveApCircuitPreTx(db, network, input.macAddress); const outcome = await db.transaction(async (tx) => { ...spend({..., apCircuitId})...bindMacTx(tx, now, {..., apCircuitId})... });

snippets.description: apCircuitId REQUIRED on PaymentAttribution (compile-time forcing function); written INSERT-only on the payment_transactions row (excluded from the onConflict `detail` update set, same as networkId — location fixed at checkout).
snippets.content: interface PaymentAttribution { userId; packageId; networkId; apCircuitId: string | null }  row = { ..., apCircuitId: attribution.apCircuitId }  // not in `detail`

snippets.description: Ledger spend rows now persist apCircuitId (?? null). Conditional-debit overspend guards and all existing money math UNCHANGED.
snippets.content: tx.insert(creditLedger).values({ ..., amount: -input.amount, type: LEDGER_TYPE.spend, apCircuitId: input.apCircuitId ?? null });

snippets.description: AC8: existing revenueByAp/apLabel Maya breakdown NOT edited. New durable label resolution batched (one lookup per unique circuit-id per page, no N+1).
